# Mad Extra Bail Bonds

Licensed bail bondsman in Delray Beach, FL specializing in fast bail bond services across Palm Beach County, Broward County, and Miami-Dade County — available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

- Years in Business: 11+

## About
Mad Extra Bail Bonds is a licensed Florida bail bondsman based in Delray Beach serving South Florida families for over 11 years. We post bail across Palm Beach County, Broward County, and Miami-Dade County — covering county main jails, city lockups, and federal holding facilities. We are available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, with no answering machines and no delays. Beyond posting bond, we provide educational guidance to help families understand the process and take proactive steps to avoid future law enforcement encounters.
